name: Almond Macaroons #2
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form.
2. Mix the almond paste and salt thoroughly with the beaten egg whites.
3. Add the powdered sugar and beat everything together until well combined.
4. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto a baking sheet lightly coated with oil.
5. Bake in a moderate oven (375°F) for about 15 minutes.
6. Remove from the oven.
7. Place the baking sheet on a damp towel for a few minutes to cool slightly.
8. Use a wide spatula to remove the macaroons from the baking sheet.
36 servings.
